name: K3
_comment: Replace keywords with real, disambiguating terms. Bare 'K3' will match a lot of noise (cars, cameras) — prefer quoted multi-word phrases and product-specific terms. official_accounts drives promo detection; seed_kols are polled directly each cycle.

name: GLM
_comment: Empty template for the next product. Fill in keywords/accounts/kols, flip active to true, and it goes live on the next collection cycle. Adding a product needs ZERO code changes — do it here or via /admin/products.
